metadata.description: Banking-specific offline knowledge base for QuantHunt AI

banking_context.rbi: For banking workloads, align crypto transition plans with RBI cyber security guidance and internal audit timelines.
banking_context.payment gateway: Prioritize payment gateway and authentication perimeter endpoints for strict TLS 1.3 and PQC-hybrid pilot controls.
banking_context.core banking: Core banking domains should use a stricter risk baseline and accelerated key rotation cadence due to longer data-retention risk.
banking_context.atm network: For ATM and branch integration channels, inventory legacy TLS dependencies and schedule phased cryptographic hardening.
banking_context.banking roadmap: A banking-ready roadmap: 1) CBOM inventory of internet and partner channels, 2) strict key exchange policy, 3) HSM-backed PQC pilot, 4) audit evidence collection.

assistant.who am i: You are operating the banking mode of QuantHunt AI, focused on stricter PQC transition controls.
assistant.hello: Welcome to QuantHunt banking mode. I can help with bank-grade PQC posture analysis and remediation sequencing.
assistant.hndl: In banking environments, HNDL exposure is higher priority due to longer confidentiality windows for customer and transaction data.
